summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a high‑energy show highlighted by a stellar Morning Dew and a smoking second set.
review: The recording is a crisp soundboard mix with just enough audience ambience to convey the live vibe, making it an excellent listening experience. The concert itself bursts with energy – Jerry is on fire, Brent’s keyboards add depth, and the second set (especially Morning Dew) is repeatedly praised as one of the best of ’87.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high reviewer scores (mostly 4‑5 stars), strong praise for both performance and soundboard quality, with many detailed positive comments.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture with a subtle audience blend; reviewers call it “fantastic”, “crisp” and “excellent”.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The show is described as pure, nonstop energy with a particularly tight second set; transitions are smooth and the band “was on” all night.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly called "on fire", his guitar tone and vocal were fresh, youthful and inspiring.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboard work is highlighted for injecting energy and vocal depth – “heart of steel”.
